title: SimpleCoords
body:
# A simple mod to display your coordinates, facing and more ![base config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fc03212673d38870ab4746d92f5da66870306e5.png) ## Configuration To configure the mod you must have [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) ![Options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2df4c85a935212810257ea27e41ff009d5747230_0.webp) ![all on true](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e55e33afacc1bfc41c1a669c68c6d30c1276aaa4.png) You can contact me on Discord: r4mble_ If you found any bug or error, please write about it in the comments.
If you need a port for some version, also write about it.
